---
name: Security question (low severity)
about: Ask about security posture, hardening, or safe usage. Not for vulnerability reports.
title: "[security-question] "
labels: ["security-question", "triage"]
---

> **Do not report vulnerabilities here.** If you have found a security issue
> that affects users (code execution, data exposure, auth bypass, etc.),
> please open a private
> [GitHub Security Advisory](https://github.com/configflux/weld/security/advisories/new)
> instead. See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for the full policy.
